film.title: Bad Moms
film.overview: When three overworked and under-appreciated moms are pushed beyond their limits, they ditch their conventional responsibilities for a jolt of long overdue freedom, fun, and comedic self-indulgence.

dialogues.dialogue: Oh, my God. I am so relieved.  Thank you. Oh, my God.  Baby, I'm so proud of you!  Oh, I'm so excited. Oh, my God.  This is gonna look so awesome on my college applications.
